top_findings.summary: The skill claims to provide "systematic methodology" and "guidance" for failure analysis (a knowledge/process skill), yet requests full Write, Glob, and Bash tool permissions. These permissions would allow the skill to modify/delete any files, search entire directory structures, and execute arbitrary shell commands on the user's system, which are excessive and unrelated to its stated purpose of providing investigation frameworks, analysis guidance, and report generation methodologies. A purely analytical/guidance skill should not require such broad system-level write and execution capabilities.
